def negative_domain_object_performs_external_io():
    rule_id = "domain_object_performs_external_io"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag domain or value-like objects that open files, spawn subprocesses, or call network clients during core operations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
